name: Valencian Red Beans & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and cut the peppers into 1/2 inch pieces.
2. Cut the onion into 1/4 inch pieces.
3. Cut and seed the fresh tomatoes into 1/2 inch pieces.
4. Chop the fresh cilantro.
5. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add peppers, onion, and garlic; sauté for 5 minutes until slightly softened.
6. Stir in rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in remaining ingredients (kidney beans, broth, olives, tomatoes, basil, allspice, cayenne pepper, salt substitute, and onions greens) except cilantro.
8. Cover the pot and simmer over medium-low heat for 20 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed.
9. Stir in cilantro and gently toss to combine.
10. Serve hot.
